subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The Sun of divine grace hath risen and shone forth from the horizon of bounty, and the Ocean of favor hath become manifest in this blessed Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله آفتاب عنایت الهی از افق کرم مشرق و طالع و بحر فضل در این یوم مبارک ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
